form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 8th (Sr1) over 2160m at this track beaten 55 m by Arnies Army (2:39.10) in NR up to 70 on April 5 at $23. form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 2.25 m (Sr3) at Tamworth (1:55.00) beating Paris Princess in NR up to 65 on February 19 at $8. Two runs back 4th (Fr3) over 1980m after showing early speed at Tamworth, beaten 5 m by Ashleys Blue Chip (2:29.00) in NR 61 to 70 on February 5 at $19. Not likely to threaten this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Weakened inside the 500m and was unresponsive.
Held up for clear running over the concluding stages and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Last start by 4 m after showing early speed, (Fr4) at Tamworth (1:55.80) beating Heza Doozie in NR up to 70 on March 26 at $11 at the bell was leading 2.64. Big chance of back-to-back wins.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly and broke gait entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Hard to fault of late. Last start a big 3.5 m win as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:39.10) beating Last Time Joe in NR up to 70 on April 5 at $1.95. Likely to measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hard to fault of late. Last start a big 3.5 m win as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:39.10) beating Last Time Joe in NR up to 70 on April 5 at $1.95. Likely to measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr5) over 2160m at this track beaten 14 m by Arnies Army (2:39.10) in NR up to 70 on April 5 at $34. Two runs back tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 4.5 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Tamworth (2:26.80) beating Topsies Bling in NR up to 53 on March 26 at $2.30 at the bell was 2nd-2.43. Decent effort last start. Can play a role in the finish.
